productDisplayName: Puma Men's Webster Brown Flip Flop
description: Comfort at its best, the puma Webster flip flops are stylish to look at and feel great on the feet. With a grooved footbed offering all-day massaged comfort, there's no better way to pamper your feet in style.Upper Synthetic leather straps with a toe separator for durability and to hold the foot in place Midsole PU footbed for lightweight comfort and durabilityStrategically grooved to offer a massaged comfortSlightly curved towards the forefoot for ergonomic comfort and protection to the forefoot Outsole TPR outsole for durabilityTriangular and rectangular lugs for maximum traction and grip on various terrain shoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
